notableEvents.label: Chandler Simpson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Christopher Morel. Taylor Walls out at 2nd. Chandler Simpson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Junior Caminero. Xavier Edwards to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Junior Caminero. Xavier Edwards to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Yandy Díaz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yandy Díaz grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Christopher Morel. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Yandy Díaz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes pops out softly to first baseman Christopher Morel in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jakob Marsee steals (13) 2nd base. Jakob Marsee to 3rd. Jakob Marsee advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Hunter Feduccia.

notableEvents.label: Otto Lopez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Junior Caminero. Xavier Edwards to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Owen Caissie pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Owen Caissie flies out to left fielder Chandler Simpson.
